title: Dto Implementation Review
description: Stable JSON wire shape for **`GET /v1/changes/{name}/implementation-review`**, returned by `@specd/api` and consumed by `@specd/client`. Reflects manifest **implementation-tracking** (accepted links + tracked files) for Studio Impact and CLI `changes implementation review`.
context: Stable JSON wire shape for **`GET /v1/changes/{name}/implementation-review`**, returned by `@specd/api` and consumed by `@specd/client`. Reflects manifest **implementation-tracking** (accepted links + tracked files) for Studio Impact and CLI `changes implementation review`.

rules.requirement: response JSON uses stable camelCase field names
rules: The wire shape MUST use camelCase property names stable across Studio releases. OpenAPI generation MUST derive schemas from these names.

`GET .../implementation-review` MUST return:

- `specIds` — readonly list of spec IDs in the change scope
- `implementationTracking` — object with:
  - `links` — array of accepted implementation links
  - `trackedFiles` — array of tracked files under review

Each `implementationTracking.links[]` entry MUST include:

- `specId` — canonical spec ID (e.g. `ui:change-tab-impact`)
- `file` — project-relative file path (raw manifest path)
- `fileLinkExplicit` — boolean; `false` when the file row exists only as a container for symbol-level links
- `symbols` — optional string array of symbol identifiers when symbol-level links exist

Each `implementationTracking.trackedFiles[]` entry MUST include:

- `file` — project-relative file path
- `state` — one of `open`, `resolved`, `ignored`

rules.requirement: handler maps kernel projection without business rules
rules: The route handler MUST call `GetImplementationReview` and serialize `implementationTracking` via [`api:presenter-change`](../presenter-change/spec.md) (or equivalent presenter) without adding lifecycle, validation, or graph enrichment in v1. CLI graph stale-symbol enrichment remains CLI-only unless a future change adds an API flag.

rules.requirement: optional fields are omitted rather than null
rules: Optional properties (e.g. `symbols`) MUST be omitted from JSON when absent unless the OpenAPI schema explicitly allows `null`.

constraints: @specd/api delivery and composition code MUST import host bootstrap and kernel types from @specd/sdk, not @specd/core or @specd/code-graph directly.
HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.requirement: response JSON uses stable camelCase field names
scenarios.name: Implementation review JSON uses camelCase keys
then: response keys are specIds and implementationTracking
AND nested keys are links, trackedFiles, specId, file, fileLinkExplicit, state

scenarios.name: Response includes specIds and tracking object
then: AND implementationTracking object with links and trackedFiles arrays

scenarios.name: Link row includes required fields
given: change has at least one implementation link
then: each link has specId, file, and fileLinkExplicit
AND symbols appears only when symbol links exist

scenarios.name: Tracked file states are enumerated
then: each entry has file and state
AND state is open, resolved, or ignored

scenarios.requirement: handler maps kernel projection without business rules
scenarios.name: API does not enrich stale symbols in v1
then: AND does not call code-graph enrichment unless a future spec adds it

scenarios.requirement: optional fields are omitted rather than null
scenarios.name: optional fields are omitted rather than null — primary path
when: Optional properties (e.g. symbols) MUST be omitted from
then: AND no forbidden side effects occur

scenarios.requirement: optional fields are omitted rather than null
scenarios.name: optional fields are omitted rather than null — guard path
given: inputs that stress the requirement boundary
then: errors or skips are explicit and documented
